session_id: ANL-2026-04-25-重建对于该项目的完全掌握和认知

relevant_files.summary: Single-path rule resolution: context load, priority sorting, activation stubs, payload build.
Batch planning view with shared bundle, file map, derived identity diagnostics.
HTTP control plane: REST APIs, SSE, Streamable HTTP MCP sessions, Dashboard static.
Compiles .fabric/agents markdown into agents.meta.json and extracts declared stable IDs.
Agents metadata schema and default derivation for layer, topology, stable ID, identity source.
Dashboard REST/SSE client; no direct MCP client.

key_findings: Rule priority is high, medium, low; same priority falls back to node id ordering.
Stable IDs are declared via HTML comment, compiled by sync-meta, and surfaced in plan-context diagnostics.
Current root .fabric registry is incomplete; only .fabric/audit.jsonl exists.
Dashboard is architecturally observation-first but currently still has approve/annotate write paths.
constraints: Do not edit packages/ before updating SPEC_INTERNAL.md for core engine changes.
Do not directly edit .fabric/agents.meta.json; use Fabric tooling.
When packages/ changes, CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md must be synchronized.
